description: A customer needs to send $2,500 USD to a recipient in the United Kingdom.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the customer and collect all required recipient and bank details (Name, Address, IBAN, SWIFT/BIC).

expected_outcome.value: Agent securely verifies the customer and accurately collects all necessary transfer information.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total cost including the transfer fee and currency exchange rate, and get customer confirmation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the total debit amount and receives approval from the customer.

nodes.task_description: Execute the wire transfer and provide the customer with a confirmation number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the transfer and provides the correct reference number.
